title: gyrocheilos taishanense
intro: Gyrocheilos taishanense is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Stemonuraceae. It is native to Guangxi and Guangdong provinces in southern China. The medicinal properties of Gyrocheilos taishanense include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant activities, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine, where herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions are made from the plant's leaves and stems.
